cases.input: Generate a tech spec for this user story: As a customer, I want to place an order online so that I can purchase products without visiting the store.
cases.context: E-commerce platform, .NET 9 API backend, Azure Cosmos DB, React frontend, Azure App Service, existing authentication via Entra ID

cases.input: Spec the notification service feature: the system should send email, SMS, and push notifications when order status changes. Include all required C4 diagrams.
cases.context: Microservices architecture, Azure Service Bus for messaging, Azure Communication Services for email/SMS, 100,000 daily users

cases.input: We're adding a new payment processing capability. Generate the spec including architectural decision records for every significant technology choice.
cases.context: Azure-hosted SaaS, Stripe vs Azure Payment SDK decision needed, PCI-DSS scope, existing Cosmos DB and .NET stack

cases.input: Spec the discount calculation engine: apply promotional codes, tier-based discounts, and volume pricing rules to a shopping cart.
cases.context: .NET 9, functional programming paradigm required, Result<T> error handling, pure functions for business logic, DDD bounded context: pricing

cases.input: We have an epic: Employee Expense Management. Stories: (1) Submit expense claim, (2) Manager approval workflow, (3) Finance payment processing. Generate specs for all three stories.
cases.context: Cloud-native .NET solution, 1000 employees, D365 integration for payment, GDPR compliance, Azure Blob Storage for receipts
